design_plan: Cinematic editorial landing with a dark premium theme, Satoshi font stack, AIDA structure, GSAP‑guarded motion, and responsive bento grids that explicitly use grid-auto-flow: dense to avoid layout gaps. Strong ecommerce workflows, clear CTAs, and fair competitor framing with Super differentiated on repeated computer-use and cache efficiency.
headline: Super for ecommerce operators monitoring orders, support, and repetitive admin

site_brief.audience: ecommerce operators monitoring orders, support, and repetitive admin
site_brief.goal: Create a conversion-focused landing page for this audience. Tie current market evidence to pain points, then show how Super can operate apps and reuse a computer-use cache for repeated work.
queries: ecommerce operators monitoring orders, support, and repetitive admin AI assistant
ecommerce operators monitoring orders, support, and repetitive admin personal AI agent
site_brief.title: Super for ecommerce operators monitoring orders, support, and repetitive admin

summary: A conversion‑focused niche landing page showing how Super helps ecommerce operators reduce daily operational drag by letting personal AI agents operate real tools, reuse a computer-use cache, and handle repeated admin across orders and support—positioned clearly against ChatGPT, Gemini, Grok, Siri, Folk, and Orchids with current market evidence.
